text: adjustment is removed from risk scores for all non-ESRD months by multiplying by a factor applicable for that year (provided in the Announcement of Calendar Year MA Capitation Rates and Part C and Part D Payment Policies). Beneficiaries who were not included in the CMS-HCC risk score file will not have CMS-HCC risk score data reported for any months.
